_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal phenotype development in a minipig model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Through systematic tracking we have shown that an NF1+/ex42del minipig model develops phenotypic characteristics [1] CALMs, [2] axillary/inguinal freckling, [3] shortened stature, [4] tibial bone curvature, and [5] histological variations in neurofibroma growth.
details: NF1+/ex42del minipigs develop five key phenotypic characteristics: CALMs, axillary/inguinal freckling, shortened stature, tibial bone curvature, and histological variations in neurofibroma growth
